headline: Tooling for retrieval and file workflows leads the month while agent harnesses and voice pipelines push toward production.
body: Vector database, vector search, file handling, and analytics all sit at peak momentum, alongside automated review, marking a rotation toward retrieval and workflow tooling. Antigravity automates file system workflows across repositories and local projects, and a survey of 17 Claude plugins spans Firecrawl, LightRAG, and Stripe CLI integrations. On the agent side, a five-component harness framework is positioned as the execution layer between model predictions and completed tasks, while the open-source TEN Framework targets interruptible real-time voice agents with streaming audio and turn detection. Optimal transport is breaking out among techniques, joined by new entrants including posterior collapse, model cascading, and spatial-semantic prompting.

cited_items.title: Automating workflows and file organization with Antigravity

TEN Framework: Voice AI That Can Actually Be Interrupted
